prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: main menu UI chrome pack for Orbwalker
Primary request: create a production candidate UI kit sheet for main menu buttons, frames, stats panels, and menu medallion icons as an opaque chroma-key source.
Subject: primary button, secondary button, outer border frame, stats panel frame, small icon medallions for profile, settings, achievements, relics, mastery, and best run.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy UI chrome, dark stone, beveled metal, antique gold trim, mobile readable.
Composition/framing: organized component sheet, components separated with padding, no clipping.
Color palette: charcoal stone, blackened steel, antique gold, subtle cyan and violet accents, but no magenta inside components.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta key background #FF00FF only.
Constraints: one exact background color #FF00FF; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no smoke touching background; no frame/panel/matte backdrop unless it is an actual UI component; no labels; no text baked into buttons; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: absolutely no #FF00FF or near-magenta key tones inside any component art.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
